Footer.aboutText: Premium laundry and dry cleaning services in Bangkok and Pattaya. We blend state-of-the-art technology with artisanal care to preserve your finest garments.

Home.metaTitle: Premium Laundry Service & Dry Cleaning | That Laundry Shop
Home.metaDesc: Professional laundry services, dry cleaning, and ironing in Bangkok and Pattaya. Fast, reliable, and premium care for your clothes.
Home.heroTitle: Premium Care for Your Finest Garments.
Home.heroSubtitle: Experience Bangkok and Pattaya's most trusted laundry and dry cleaning service. We blend state-of-the-art technology with artisanal care.
Home.goldStandardDesc: We don't just wash clothes; we preserve them. Our meticulous processes ensure your garments return looking vibrant, fresh, and flawlessly pressed.
Home.ecoFriendlyDesc: Premium, hypoallergenic detergents that are tough on stains but gentle on the environment and your skin.
Home.turnaroundDesc: Fast, reliable service. Schedule a pickup today and have your clothes returned perfectly crisp tomorrow.
Home.artisanalDesc: Hand-finished pressing and specialized dry cleaning protocols for your most delicate fabrics.
Home.ctaDesc: Join thousands of satisfied customers in Bangkok and Pattaya who trust That Laundry Shop with their wardrobe.

Services.metaTitle: Premium Laundry Services | That Laundry Shop
Services.metaDesc: Explore our meticulous garment care services including Wash & Fold, Eco-Dry Cleaning, Carpet Cleaning, and Corporate Laundry solutions.
Services.ourServicesSubtitle: From simple wash and fold for individual customers to large-scale commercial solutions. We are the trusted partner for perfect fabric care.
Services.individualSubtitle: Premium care for your personal wardrobe and home.
Services.washFoldDesc: The perfect solution for your daily laundry needs. We expertly sort, wash using premium detergents, dry, and neatly fold your clothes.
Services.dryCleanDesc: For items that require a gentle touch. Our European dry cleaning process safely removes stains and revitalizes fabrics without water.
Services.ironingDesc: Already washed your clothes but hate ironing? Drop off your clean clothes and we will professionally press them to perfection.
Services.carpetDesc: Revitalize your living space with our specialized deep-cleaning for heavy home fabrics, carpets, and elegant drapery.
Services.corporateSubtitle: A reliable partner for the corporate world. High-volume, impeccable standards.
Services.corpLaundryDesc: Tailored employee uniform cleaning, executive garment care, and office linen solutions ensuring your team always looks their best.
Services.commLaundryDesc: Heavy-duty, large-scale fabric cleaning for gyms, spas, and clinics requiring rigorous hygiene standards and rapid turnaround.
Services.hotelLaundryDesc: Exclusive high-volume white-glove service for luxury hotels and resorts in Pattaya. Perfect bedding, towels, and guest laundry.
Services.fbLaundryDesc: Specialized stain removal and hygiene-focused cleaning for restaurant linens, chef uniforms, and front-of-house aprons.

Pricing.metaDesc: Transparent, premium pricing for our laundry and dry cleaning services. Become a member and save on garments, duvets, and more.
Pricing.subtitle: Transparent, premium care without hidden fees. Join as a member for exclusive discounts.
Pricing.descWeight: Perfect for your everyday casual wear. Wash, dry, and neatly folded.
Pricing.descLinens: Crisp, fresh sheets and fluffy duvets for a perfect night's sleep.
Pricing.descIroning: Immaculate pressing for a sharp, professional look.
Pricing.descPcs: Individual care for your delicate and structured pieces.
Pricing.descDryclean: Eco-friendly solvent cleaning for your most precious garments.
Pricing.noItems: No items available in this category.

Contact.metaTitle: Contact Us & Branches | That Laundry Shop
Contact.metaDesc: Find our laundry branches across Bangkok and Pattaya. Get in touch via phone, email, or Line for premium laundry and dry cleaning services.
Contact.subtitle: We're here to help. Find our nearest branch, check our opening hours, or reach out to our customer service team.

Promotions.metaDesc: Join That Laundry Shop's premium membership for exclusive laundry rates, or check out our latest promotions and discounts in Bangkok.
Promotions.title: Memberships & Promos
Promotions.subtitle: Unlock exclusive rates by becoming a member, or take advantage of our current seasonal promotions. Premium care has never been more rewarding.
Promotions.memberDesc: Choose from our flexible monthly subscription tiers to unlock exclusive laundry rates and premium privileges.
Promotions.formDesc: Submit your details, and our team will contact you to complete your premium membership setup.
Promotions.formConfidentiality: All data provided to us will be dealt with strict confidentiality at all times.
Promotions.formSuccessDesc: Thank you! Our customer support team will contact you shortly via WhatsApp or Email to finalize your setup.
Promotions.advancePaymentNote: ★ Minimum subscription period. Paid in advance for 6 or 12 months.
Promotions.firstTimeDesc: Experience the That Laundry Shop difference. Get 20% off your entire first order of Wash & Fold or Dry Cleaning.
Promotions.duvetDesc: Spend over 1,500 THB on any standard laundry service and get one Duvet or Comforter cleaned absolutely free!

Booking.metaTitle: Schedule Your Pickup | That Laundry Shop
Booking.metaDesc: Book a premium laundry and dry cleaning pickup directly to your hotel or condo in Bangkok and Pattaya.
Booking.subtitle: Experience the gold standard of garment care. Fill out the details below, and our concierge will handle the rest.
Booking.fastTurnaroundDesc: Standard 24 hours. Express same-day service available upon request.
Booking.doorToDoorDesc: We pick up from and deliver directly to your hotel lobby or condo residence.
Booking.disclaimerTurnaroundDesc2: Express 50: Same Day before 18:00 (+50% Surcharge, if picked up before 12:00)
Booking.disclaimerTurnaroundDesc3: Express 50 (Next Day): Next Day at 12:00 (+50% Surcharge, if picked up before 16:00)
Booking.disclaimerTurnaroundDesc4: Express 100: Same Day before 19:00 (+100% Surcharge, if picked up before 16:00)
Booking.disclaimerExpressNote: Note: Any laundry requested faster than standard next-day turnaround automatically triggers an Express surcharge.
Booking.disclaimerLogisticsDesc: All transport services use a distance-based tier. The final cost is the higher of:
Booking.disclaimerLogisticsExample: (Example: A 2 KM trip costs 30 Baht because the minimum charge is higher. A 5 KM trip costs 50 Baht.)
Booking.bookingReceivedSuccess: Thank you for choosing That Laundry Shop. We have received your request.
Booking.verificationDesc1: Concierge Confirmation Required: Your order is not fully confirmed upon form submission.
Booking.verificationDesc2: Contact Method: Our concierge team will review your order and contact you primarily via WhatsApp (or your alternative provided contact method).
Booking.verificationDesc3: Final Approval: The booking is officially confirmed only after our concierge verifies your details and understands your specific requests.

Booking.howToPickup: How to pick up your laundry? *

Booking.phoneErrorInvalid: Please enter a valid phone number length for WhatsApp.

Articles.title: News & Garment Care Articles
Articles.subtitle: Stay up to date with our latest announcements, luxury fabric insights, and expert care tips.

Hotels.metaTitle: Hotels & Serviced Apartments | That Laundry Shop
Hotels.metaDesc: View our comprehensive directory of premium hotels, serviced apartments, and condominiums in Bangkok and Pattaya that partner with That Laundry Shop.
Hotels.title: Hotels & Serviced Apartments
Hotels.subtitle: We provide premium laundry and dry cleaning services to guests staying at the most prestigious hotels, serviced apartments, and luxury condominiums in Thailand.
Hotels.articleTitle: Experience Unmatched Garment Care at Thailand's Finest Addresses
Hotels.articleP1: Whether you are enjoying a luxurious staycation in the heart of Bangkok or taking a well-deserved coastal retreat in Pattaya, managing your laundry should be the least of your concerns. That Laundry Shop partners with the most prestigious hotels, high-end serviced apartments, and exclusive condominiums across Thailand to bring unparalleled garment care directly to your door.
Hotels.articleP2: Our bespoke services go beyond the standard wash and fold. From delicate silk evening gowns and tailored business suits to everyday casual wear, our expert team utilizes state-of-the-art dry cleaning technology, eco-friendly solvents, and meticulous hand-ironing techniques. We understand that your wardrobe is an investment, and we treat every single fiber with the utmost respect and care.
Hotels.articleH3: Why Choose Our Premium Hotel Delivery Service?
Hotels.articleL1: Seamless Door-to-Door Delivery: We coordinate directly with your hotel concierge or condo juristic office for hassle-free pickups and drop-offs.
Hotels.articleL2: Express & Next-Day Turnaround: Perfect for business travelers and vacationers on a tight schedule who need their garments fresh and ready to wear.
Hotels.articleL3: Expert Stain Removal: Specialized treatments for tough stains, ensuring your favorite pieces are restored to their pristine condition.
Hotels.articleFooter: Explore our extensive directory above to find your residence or hotel. Don't see your location? Contact our customer service team, and we will arrange a special pickup just for you. With That Laundry Shop, impeccable style and uncompromising cleanliness are always just a tap away.

Condominiums.metaDesc: View the list of premium residential condominiums in Bangkok and Pattaya that partner with That Laundry Shop for professional garment care.
Condominiums.title: Serviced Condominiums
Condominiums.subtitle: We provide premium laundry and dry cleaning services directly to residents living in the most exclusive condominiums in Thailand.
